news.summary: In a memo to employees last Friday, Jerome H. Powell, the head of the central bank, announced a voluntary deferred resignation program would be implemented.
news.headline: Fed plans to reduce workforce by 10% gradually, as Chair Jerome Powell announces voluntary resignation program for staff.

news.summary: Yesterday in Santiago, Chile, Banco Santander Chile hosted its annual Santander Day event, demonstrating its dedication to the community and its goal of being an inclusive bank in Chile. The event, which saw the launch of new commercial products and initiatives, emphasized the company's commitment to being a global and accessible financial institution. Banco Santander Chile, also known as “Santander Chile” and listed on the NYSE as BSAC and SSE as Bsantander, did not discuss any financial results or future expectations during the event. They continue to strengthen their presence in people's and businesses' lives in Chile.
news.headline: Banco Santander Chile unveils new initiatives at Santander Day event, reaffirming commitment to community and inclusivity. No financial discussions.
China Embassy rejects US remarks on Argentina currency swap.

news.summary: Christy Goldsmith Romero of the CFTC will resign on May 31, leaving three vacancies at the regulator. Romero, who had planned to leave once Brian Quintenz was confirmed as chair, will depart just after Commissioner Summer Mersinger. This leaves only two confirmed members on the CFTC board: acting chair Caroline Pham and Commissioner Kristin Johnson. President Trump will have the chance to appoint two new commissioners after Quintenz's confirmation. Romero expressed gratitude for her 23 years of service at the agency. Mersinger is expected to join the Blockchain Association as CEO. Stay updated for more details on this evolving situation.
news.headline: CFTC commissioner Christy Goldsmith Romero to resign on May 31, leaving 3 open seats. Two remaining Senate-confirmed members.

news.summary: The unilateral policy change faced objection from the union. Starbucks mentioned that the disruption caused by this change has been minimal.
news.headline: Baristas protesting dress code change staged walkouts. Despite objections, Starbucks reported minimal disruption.

news.summary: Basel Medical Group, a company headquartered in Singapore, has announced that it is currently in talks to allocate $1 billion worth of Bitcoin to its balance sheet as part of its expansion efforts in Asia.
news.headline: Healthcare firm listed on Nasdaq plans to buy $1B worth of Bitcoin as part of its expansion in Asia.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Timbercreek Financial Corp. (TSX:TF) disclosed the outcomes of the board of directors' election during its annual shareholders' meeting. Originally set for May 7, 2025, the meeting was rescheduled due to insufficient quorum. All candidates listed in the March 24, 2025 circular were successfully voted onto the board. Specific figures for the proxy votes have been provided: Number of votes for Election of Directors - [number]; Percentage of votes for Election of Directors - [percentage]; Number of votes withheld for Election of Directors - [number]; Percentage of votes withheld for Election of Directors - [percentage].
news.headline: Timbercreek Financial Corp. announces results from annual meeting, board of directors elected, held on May 9, 2025.

news.summary: Numerous airlines, hotels, and industry experts are predicting a gloomy tourism season in the United States due to the impact of potential tariffs and contentious policy choices. The sector is bracing for a downturn in visitor numbers and revenue as a result of these factors.
news.headline: Impending summer travel slump in U.S. as airlines, hotels, analysts predict downturn due to tariffs and policy decisions.

news.summary: A New Hampshire state lawmaker, Seth Miller, recently took a stand against Avelo Airlines by putting up billboard advertisements in protest of the airline's involvement in operating deportation flights for the federal government. Avelo Airlines has retaliated by accusing Mr. Miller of copyright infringement. The incident highlights Mr. Miller's opposition to the deportation flights, sparking a legal dispute with the airline.
news.headline: NH lawmaker faces legal battle for protesting Avelo Airlines' deportation flights for ICE through billboard ads. Copyright infringement alleged.

news.summary: Today, Medline revealed that it has reached a Prime Vendor agreement with Graystone Eye located in Hickory, N.C. The agreement covers the organization's ophthalmic physician offices and surgery center. Graystone Eye, boasting a team of 13 board-certified ophthalmologists and one optometrist, will benefit from this partnership. The agreement, announced on May 16, 2025, signifies a significant development in enhancing the medical services provided by Graystone Eye.
news.headline: Medline secures Prime Vendor agreement with Graystone Eye in Hickory, N.C., involving 13 ophthalmologists and 1 optometrist.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Allentown, Pennsylvania, PPL Corporation (NYSE: PPL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.2725 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be paid on July 1, 2025, to shareholders on record as of June 10, 2025. PPL Corporation, based in Allentown, is a prominent company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PPL.
news.headline: PPL stockholders to receive $0.2725 per share dividend on Jul. 1, 2025; Record date: Jun. 10, 2025.

news.summary: Greenland Resources Inc. has successfully completed a non-brokered private placement on May 5, 2025, issuing 3,882,352 units at $0.85 per unit, resulting in gross proceeds of around $3,300,000. Each unit includes one common share of the company. The private placement was oversubscribed and upsized, showing strong investor interest in the offering. Greenland Resources is listed as CBOE CA: MOLY | FSE: M0LY.
news.headline: Greenland Resources closes private placement by issuing 3,882,352 units at $0.85 each, raising $3.3 million.
NYMEX Natural Gas June futures settle at $3.3340/MMBtu.

news.summary: Basel Medical Group is facing a 15% drop in its shares after announcing plans to purchase $1 billion worth of Bitcoin for its corporate treasury. The company stated that this move would help in creating a strong balance sheet for future mergers and acquisitions and provide financial flexibility. Shareholders have not responded positively to this news, leading to a decline in the company's stock value. In April, Basel had already acquired Bethesda Medical as part of its expansion strategy in the Asian healthcare market. Corporate treasuries collectively hold around $80 billion in Bitcoin, with companies viewing it as a hedge against fiscal deficits and geopolitical risks. Shareholders have previously punished companies for similar initiatives, like GameStop losing billions in market capitalization for their Bitcoin treasury plans.
news.headline: Basel Medical shares drop 15% on $1B Bitcoin buy plans, aiming for strong balance sheet amid volatile market.
NYMEX Gasoline June futures settle at $2.1418 a gallon.

news.summary: VNBTC is a cloud mining platform in London, UK, revolutionizing cryptocurrency mining with accessible, scalable, and secure opportunities in 2025. New users receive a $79 bonus for the Doge Starter Plan, where they can earn up to $6.64 per week risk-free. With nine flexible mining plans starting at $79, users enjoy daily payouts, robust security measures, and eco-friendly operations. Users can earn up to 3% referral commissions and participate in the VNBTC Global Bounty Program. VNBTC caters to beginners and large-scale investors, offering various contracts with potential profits detailed in the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: VNBTC offers free $79 credit for new users, flexible mining plans from $79 to premium, daily earnings, and referral commissions.Characters: 127

news.summary: In Toronto, the Ontario School Board Council of Unions (OSBCU) has expressed concern over the recent budget announcement, which appears to overlook the critical issue of understaffing in public education. The council is urging for an urgent injection of funds to tackle the staffing shortages in schools throughout Ontario. Despite an apparent rise of $2.6 billion in Ministry of Education funding, the OSBCU emphasizes that this budget fails to adequately address the severe understaffing crisis affecting schools. The council believes that more substantial support is needed for school boards, students, and frontline education workers in the province.
news.headline: OSBCU criticizes Ontario budget for inadequate public education funding, calls for surge in funding due to understaffing crisis. $2.6B increase insufficient.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Liberate Bio, Inc., a biotech company, revealed that Melissa Deck, Director of Platform, presented at the Oligonucleotide and Peptide Therapeutics 2025 conference in San Diego, California. The presentation highlighted the efficacy of Liberate’s RAPTOR™ screening platform and NHP data for their initial lead candidates. This event took place from May 19th to 22nd, 2025.
news.headline: Liberate Bio presents at TIDES on RAPTOR LNP Platform and CAR-M programs; reveals NHP data for lead candidates.

news.summary: Trex Company, Inc. (NYSE:TREX), known as the leading global manufacturer of wood-alternative decking and railing products, revealed its involvement in the upcoming JP Morgan 2025 Homebuilding & Building Products Conference. This event is scheduled to take place in New York, NY on Wednesday, May 21st, where a Fireside Chat featuring Trex's Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, Adam Zambanini, will commence at 8:15 AM EDT. As a prominent player in the industry, Trex continues to showcase its innovative, low-maintenance outdoor living solutions at key investor events like this one.
news.headline: Trex to attend JP Morgan 2025 Homebuilding & Building Products Conference in NY on May 21, with EVP Adam Zambanini.

news.summary: Netflix's stock reached an all-time high as Wall Street reacted favorably to the streaming giant's advertising strategy. The company's stock surged, hitting a record peak following the announcement of its advertising initiative. This news was well-received by investors and financial analysts, propelling Netflix's stock to new heights.
news.headline: Netflix stock reaches record high due to new advertising plan, positively received by Wall Street.

news.summary: American Electric Power has demonstrated progress in its price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The upgrade signifies a positive trend in the company's standing within the market. This development indicates a significant improvement in the stock's performance and potential for growth. The upgraded rating reflects the company's enhanced competitiveness and financial strength.
news.headline: American Electric Power stock gets upgraded to higher IBD Relative Strength Rating due to improving price performance.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Washington, on May 16, 2025, Activity Connection unveiled its inaugural sponsorship of the 9th Annual Senior Heroes Awards. This event celebrates outstanding individuals and organizations committed to the welfare of older adults. The sponsorship marks a significant milestone for Activity Connection as it aligns with their mission to support the well-being of seniors.
news.headline: Local company sponsors 9th Annual Senior Heroes Awards, celebrating those dedicated to senior care.

news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is set to join the S&P 500 Index on May 19, replacing Discover Financial Services (NYSE: DFS) due to the latter's acquisition by Capital One Financial. This move has caused Coinbase shares to surge more than 27%. Being the first digital-asset firm to be included in the S&P 500, this development signifies a significant step towards mainstream finance's acceptance of the cryptocurrency sector. As a result, it presents an opportune moment for investors to gain exposure through ETFs that have substantial holdings in the crypto exchange. Notably, ETFs like First Trust SkyBridge Crypto Industry & Digital Economy ETF (NYSE: CRPT) have also experienced a boost in response to Coinbase's S&P 500 listing, indicating a broader positive trend in the market.
news.headline: Coinbase to join S&P 500 on May 19, ETFs surge. Coinbase shares up 27%. First crypto firm in S&P 500. ETFs with Coinbase stakes rise.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, NASA astronaut Nichole Ayers and JAXA astronaut Takuya Onishi are set to address pre-submitted queries from middle and high school students in New York and Ohio. The astronauts will engage with both groups, offering insights and responses to the questions posed.
news.headline: NASA astronauts Ayers and JAXA Onishi speak to NY and OH students, answering questions, aiming to inspire youth.

news.summary: Bitcoin's price has been consolidating between $100,718 and $105,819, with a possible rally to $130,000 if it closes above $105,000. Ether is gaining strength and altcoins are following, but a failure to rise above $105,000 may prompt short-term selling. XRP is facing resistance at $2.65, while BNB is struggling to rebound from $644. SOL is seeing resistance at $180, while DOGE is looking to bounce from $0.21. ADA has a support at $0.86, and SUI is aiming to break above $4.25. LINK is facing selling pressure at $19.80, and AVAX may rally to $31.73 if it breaches $26.84. Readers are advised to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: BTC price could rally to $130K with a close above $105K. ETH gains strength, altcoins follow. $100K crucial support. Source: unidentified.

news.summary: Trip.com Group Limited (NASDAQ: TCOM) is expected to announce its first-quarter financial results on May 19. Analysts anticipate earnings of $5.57 per share, a decrease from $6 per share compared to the previous year. The company forecasts quarterly revenue to be $13.82 billion, up from $11.9 billion year-over-year. In the fourth quarter, Trip.com reported adjusted EPS of $0.60, surpassing the estimated $0.52. Net revenue saw a 23% increase to RMB12.7 billion, attributed to higher travel demand. The sales in USD amounted to $1.75 billion, exceeding the estimated $1.69 billion. Trip.com's shares fell by 1.3% on Thursday, closing at $65.51. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trip.com will report Q1 earnings of $5.57/share on May 19, with projected revenue of $13.82B, up from $11.9B last year.

news.summary: Synteq Digital, a leading global provider of digital compute infrastructure, services, and solutions, has revealed the acquisition of a sizable property in New Hampshire. The purchase includes a vast 30,000-square-foot warehouse situated on an expansive 11-acre site. This strategic move aims to bolster Synteq's presence in the region and potentially expand its operational capacity.
news.headline: Synteq Digital bought a new NH warehouse with 30,000 sq ft on an 11-acre site, expanding their US presence.

news.summary: The popular Solana game Nyan Heroes, which showcases cats in robot suits, is reaching its conclusion. Currently, the price of NYAN has experienced a substantial decline, dropping by almost 99% from its highest point.
news.headline: 'Solana's 'Nyan Heroes' game closes due to funding problems. NYAN price drops by almost 99%.'

news.summary: Phoenix, A prominent figure in the broadcast news industry, Sandra Connell, will be departing Talent Dynamics next month after many years of service. In June 2022, she made the decision to sell the company to Glass City Talent, LLC, a company owned by Patrick McCreery and Gary Brown. This news comes after decades of dedicated work at Talent Dynamics. Sandra's contributions are greatly appreciated, and the transition signifies a new chapter for the company under its new ownership.
news.headline: Sandra Connell to leave Talent Dynamics after decades; sold to Glass City Talent in June 2022.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Halethorpe, Maryland, Fzata, Inc. disclosed the addition of Gianna Arnold, JD, MS as an independent member to their board of directors. Arnold, who currently serves as counsel at Saul Ewing, LLP and CEO of NuMoon Technologies, LLC, brings a wealth of experience to the role. The appointment has been made to enhance the diverse perspectives on the board, which now stands at a total of X members. This move indicates Fzata, Inc.'s commitment to strengthening their leadership team with seasoned professionals from various backgrounds.
news.headline: Fzata, Inc. appoints Gianna Arnold, JD, MS as new independent board member on May 16, 2025.

news.summary: Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS) announced disappointing fourth-quarter financial results, falling short of expectations. The company posted quarterly earnings of $1.03 per share, below the analyst consensus of $1.10 per share. Quarterly sales were reported at $615.76 million, missing the projected $653.22 million. CEO Scott Barbour noted a 3% increase in domestic construction market sales in Fiscal 2025, driven by their material conversion strategy in stormwater and onsite wastewater markets. Additionally, organic sales in key segments like Infiltrator and Allied Products saw growth of 4.6% and 2.5% respectively. The company also provided a sales forecast for FY26, which was below estimates. Barbour emphasized the continued focus on driving market performance and leveraging their strengths in profitable segments.
news.headline: Advanced Drainage Systems reported Q4 earnings of $1.03/share, missing estimates. Sales totaled $615.76 million below estimates. CEO notes strong segment growth.

news.summary: Deere & Company's (NYSE: DE) second-quarter results led to multiple analysts increasing the price forecast for the company. The reported net sales and revenue declined by 16% year-over-year to $12.76 billion, surpassing the anticipated $10.79 billion. Deere & Company projects a net income for FY25 between $4.75 billion and $5.5 billion (previously $5 billion to $5.5 billion). Raymond James analyst Tim Thein raised the price forecast from $530 to $560, maintaining an Outperform rating. The analyst adjusted the model to reflect the robust second-quarter operating results and approximated $400 million in expected tariff-related costs for the latter part of the year. Thein highlighted that the Production & Precision Agriculture (PP&A) segment is likely to face the least direct impact percentage-wise from these costs. The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analysts raise Deere's price forecast post Q2 results, net sales dip 16% to $12.76B. FY25 net income projected between $4.75B and $5.5B.
